changes: Initial release of the Fly Mode plugin.
Added FPS-style fly navigation: hold RMB to look around and fly.
W/A/S/D movement, Space/Shift for up/down, with mouse wheel speed control.
Integrated toggle into the View menu.
All movement keys rebindable via the Keybindings menu.
Configurable base speed, faster/slower multipliers, mouse sensitivity, and invert-pitch toggle in Settings → Preview.
